input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.6
            TITLE: width

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.6: Width
T.7.6 Width 
In plan view, any part of any Aerodynamic Device must be:

RULE: t.7.6.3
            TITLE: when rearward of the centerline of the rear wheel axles:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.6.3: When rearward of the centerline of the rear wheel axles:
T.7.6.3 When rearward of the centerline of the rear wheel axles: 
In the Rear Aerodynamic Zone

RULE: t.7.6.1
            TITLE: when forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.6.1: When forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles:
T.7.6.1 When forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles:   
Inboard of two vertical planes parallel to the centerline of the chassis touching the outside of 
the front tires at the height of the hubs.

RULE: t.7.6.2
            TITLE: when between the centerlines of the front and rear wheel axles:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.6.2: When between the centerlines of the front and rear wheel axles:
T.7.6.2 When between the centerlines of the front and rear wheel axles:   
Inboard of a line drawn connecting the outer surfaces of the front and rear tires at the height 
of the wheel centers

final_answer: rule T.7.6: Width In plan view, any part of any Aerodynamic Device must be:
